## Summary

- What changed?
- Why was it needed?

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated
- [ ] Docs updated (if API/behavior changed)
- [ ] Changelog updated (`CHANGELOG.md`) when user-facing
- [ ] Security impact reviewed (inputs, HTML sinks, URLs, auth, storage)
- [ ] Breaking change noted (if applicable)

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Relevant unit tests
- [ ] Relevant e2e/smoke tests (if applicable)

## Notes for reviewers

- Risk areas:
- Follow-up items (if any):
